description.value:
Benefit: Your body uses chakra to heal itself. When resting to regain hit points, you may heal double your hit points but your chakra pool and chakra reserve recovers only half (rounded down) their normal amount.

Special: If you possess the Light Sleeper feat and use it, you recover a normal full night's rest but only recover one quarter (rounded down) of your chakra pool and chakra reserve.
